switzerland.zh: 瑞士是欧洲最受欢迎的旅行目的地之一，以阿尔卑斯山、清澈湖泊和世界级滑雪胜地闻名。从苏黎世的金融繁华到卢塞恩的中世纪魅力，从因特拉肯的湖光山色到采尔马特的马特洪峰——瑞士将自然美景与奢华体验完美融合。推荐乘坐黄金列车穿越阿尔卑斯，入住百年传承的五星酒店，品味瑞士巧克力和奶酪火锅。
switzerland.en: Switzerland is one of Europe's most popular travel destinations, renowned for the Alps, crystal-clear lakes, and world-class ski resorts. From Zurich's financial hub to Lucerne's medieval charm, from Interlaken's alpine scenery to Zermatt's Matterhorn — Switzerland perfectly blends natural beauty with luxury. Take the Golden Pass through the Alps, stay at century-old five-star hotels, and savor Swiss chocolate and fondue.

tanzania.zh: 坦桑尼亚是东非最具代表性的 Safari 目的地。从塔兰吉雷国家公园到塞伦盖蒂大草原，从恩戈罗恩戈罗火山口到桑给巴尔岛的白沙滩——这里是野生动物的天堂。每年六月至九月，超过百万头角马、斑马和瞪羚穿越塞伦盖蒂，构成地球上最壮观的动物大迁徙。入住 Singita 或 &Beyond 旗下野奢营地，在无垠的星空下享受世界顶级的荒野奢华。
tanzania.en: Tanzania is East Africa's most iconic safari destination. From Tarangire National Park to the Serengeti plains, from Ngorongoro Crater to Zanzibar's white beaches — this is wildlife paradise. Each year from June to September, over a million wildebeest, zebra, and gazelle cross the Serengeti in the greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth. Stay at Singita or &Beyond luxury lodges under endless African skies.

italy.zh: 意大利是艺术、美食与时尚的朝圣之地。米兰是全球时尚之都，科莫湖则是阿尔卑斯山脚下的隐世明珠。从达芬奇《最后的晚餐》到米兰大教堂的哥特尖塔，从科莫湖畔的贵族别墅到米其林星级餐厅——意大利北部将文艺复兴的辉煌与当代奢华生活完美交织。推荐乘坐科莫湖游船，入住阿玛尼酒店，在蒙特拿破仑大街享受私人购物体验。
italy.en: Italy is the mecca of art, cuisine, and fashion. Milan is the global fashion capital, while Lake Como is a hidden gem at the foot of the Alps. From Leonardo's Last Supper to the Gothic spires of the Duomo, from noble villas on Lake Como to Michelin-starred restaurants — northern Italy weaves Renaissance splendor with contemporary luxury. Take a boat cruise on Lake Como, stay at Armani Hotel, and enjoy private shopping on Via Monte Napoleone.

uk.zh: 英国是历史与现代的完美交汇点。伦敦拥有世界顶级的博物馆、皇家宫殿和米其林餐厅，剑桥则流淌着800年的学术传统。乘坐欧洲之星穿过英吉利海峡，即可从伦敦抵达巴黎。入住伦敦半岛酒店或巴黎文华东方，体验英伦绅士风范与法式优雅的终极碰撞。
uk.en: The United Kingdom is where history meets modernity. London boasts world-class museums, royal palaces, and Michelin-starred dining, while Cambridge carries 800 years of academic tradition. Take the Eurostar through the Channel Tunnel from London to Paris. Stay at The Peninsula London or Mandarin Oriental Paris for the ultimate blend of British sophistication and French elegance.

france.zh: 法国是浪漫与优雅的代名词。巴黎拥有世界闻名的卢浮宫、埃菲尔铁塔和香榭丽舍大街，凡尔赛宫则见证着太阳王的辉煌。从蒙马特的艺术气息到塞纳河畔的黄昏漫步——巴黎的每一个角落都散发着无可比拟的魅力。入住文华东方或半岛酒店，在米其林三星餐厅享受法兰西美食艺术。
france.en: France is synonymous with romance and elegance. Paris is home to the world-famous Louvre, Eiffel Tower, and Champs-Élysées, while Versailles bears witness to the Sun King's splendor. From Montmartre's artistic spirit to sunset strolls along the Seine — every corner of Paris radiates incomparable charm. Stay at Mandarin Oriental or The Peninsula, and savor French culinary artistry at three-Michelin-starred restaurants.

indonesia.zh: 印度尼西亚是东南亚最大的群岛国家，巴厘岛更是全球最受欢迎的度假胜地之一。从苍古的冲浪文化到乌布的艺术气息，从水明漾的日落酒吧到德格拉朗的梯田——巴厘岛将热带冒险与奢华度假完美结合。入住私人泳池别墅，体验丛林ATV、白水漂流，在土豆头海滩俱乐部享受绝美日落。
indonesia.en: Indonesia is Southeast Asia's largest archipelago, and Bali is one of the world's most popular resort destinations. From Canggu's surf culture to Ubud's artistic spirit, from Seminyak's sunset bars to Tegallalang's rice terraces — Bali perfectly combines tropical adventure with luxury. Stay in a private pool villa, ride jungle ATVs, raft white-water rapids, and enjoy spectacular sunsets at Potato Head Beach Club.

thailand.zh: 泰国是东南亚最迷人的旅行目的地之一。曼谷融合古老寺庙与现代奢华，丽思卡尔顿酒店坐落于湄南河畔，融合泰式优雅与现代奢华。从大皇宫的金碧辉煌到水上市场的热闹喧嚣，从泰式按摩到米其林街头美食——曼谷是一个永远不会让人厌倦的城市。
thailand.en: Thailand is one of Southeast Asia's most enchanting travel destinations. Bangkok blends ancient temples with modern luxury — The Ritz-Carlton sits along the Chao Phraya River, merging Thai elegance with contemporary luxury. From the Grand Palace's splendor to floating market bustle, from Thai massage to Michelin street food — Bangkok is a city that never grows old.

maldives.zh: 印度洋上的珍珠项链，1200座珊瑚岛组成的人间天堂。水上别墅、私人沙洲、海底餐厅——马尔代夫重新定义了奢华度假。
maldives.en: A string of 1,200 coral islands in the Indian Ocean. Overwater villas, private sandbanks, and underwater restaurants — the Maldives redefines luxury.

japan.zh: 从东京的霓虹闪烁到京都的千年古韵，从北海道的粉雪到冲绳的碧海。日本用极致的细节诠释待客之道。
japan.en: From Tokyo's neon glow to Kyoto's timeless temples, from Hokkaido's powder snow to Okinawa's turquoise waters. Japan defines hospitality through exquisite detail.

dubai.zh: 沙漠中崛起的未来之城，迪拜用超乎想象的建筑、七星级服务和无边界的奢华体验，重新定义旅行的上限。
dubai.en: A futuristic city rising from the desert. Dubai redefines the limits of travel with extraordinary architecture, seven-star service, and boundless luxury.

greece.zh: 爱琴海的蓝白梦境。圣托里尼的日落、米克诺斯的风车、雅典的千年文明——希腊是浪漫与历史的完美交汇。
greece.en: A blue-and-white dream on the Aegean Sea. Santorini sunsets, Mykonos windmills, and Athens' millennia of civilization — where romance meets history.

morocco.zh: 北非的异域花园。马拉喀什的红色城墙、撒哈拉的金色沙丘、菲斯的千年迷宫——摩洛哥是一场感官的盛宴。
morocco.en: An exotic garden in North Africa. Marrakech's red walls, the Sahara's golden dunes, Fes' ancient labyrinth — Morocco is a feast for the senses.
